required_params.name: date_column
required_params.description: Column containing the date to aggregate by

optional_params.name: time_period
optional_params.description: Time period for aggregation ('D' for daily, 'W' for weekly, 'M' for monthly, 'Q' for quarterly, 'Y' for yearly) (default: 'D')

optional_params.name: aggregation
optional_params.description: Aggregation method (mean, sum, count, min, max) or dict mapping columns to methods (default: 'mean')

optional_params.name: fill_missing
optional_params.description: Whether to fill in missing time periods with NaN (default: True)

optional_params.name: include_current_period
optional_params.description: Whether to include the current (potentially incomplete) time period (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_name
optional_params.description: Name to use for the time column in the result (default: 'time')

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that aggregates data by time periods.

aggregate_by_time.description:
Aggregate data by time periods

Parameters:
-----------
date_column : str
    Column containing the date to aggregate by
metric_columns : List[str]
    Columns containing metrics to analyze
time_period : str, default='D'
    Time period for aggregation ('D' for daily, 'W' for weekly, 'M' for monthly, 'Q' for quarterly, 'Y' for yearly)
aggregation : str or Dict[str, str], default='mean'
    Aggregation method (mean, sum, count, min, max) or dict mapping columns to methods
fill_missing : bool, default=True
    Whether to fill in missing time periods with NaN
include_current_period : bool, default=False
    Whether to include the current (potentially incomplete) time period
time_name : str, default='time'
    Name to use for the time column in the result
datetime_format : str, optional
    Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that aggregates data by time periods

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for growth rate calculation (if None, compare to previous period) (optional)

optional_params.name: annualize
optional_params.description: Whether to annualize growth rates (useful for comparing different time periods) (default: False)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method for calculating growth ('percentage', 'log', or 'cagr') (default: 'percentage')

calculate_growth_rates.description:
Calculate growth rates for aggregated metrics

Parameters:
-----------
window : int, optional
    Window size for growth rate calculation (if None, compare to previous period)
annualize : bool, default=False
    Whether to annualize growth rates (useful for comparing different time periods)
method : str, default='percentage'
    Method for calculating growth ('percentage', 'log', or 'cagr')

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates growth rates

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving average (default: 7)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method for calculating moving average ('simple', 'weighted', or 'exponential') (default: 'simple')

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Whether to center the window (for simple and weighted) (default: False)

calculate_moving_average.description:
Calculate moving averages for aggregated metrics

Parameters:
-----------
window : int, default=7
    Window size for moving average
method : str, default='simple'
    Method for calculating moving average ('simple', 'weighted', or 'exponential')
center : bool, default=False
    Whether to center the window (for simple and weighted)

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates moving averages

optional_params.name: model
optional_params.description: Type of seasonal component ('additive' or 'multiplicative') (default: 'additive')

optional_params.name: period
optional_params.description: Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated) (optional)

optional_params.name: extrapolate_trend
optional_params.description: Number of periods to extrapolate the trend into the future (optional)

decompose_trend.description:
Decompose time series into trend, seasonal, and residual components

Parameters:
-----------
metric_column : str
    Column to decompose
model : str, default='additive'
    Type of seasonal component ('additive' or 'multiplicative')
period : int, optional
    Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated)
extrapolate_trend : int, optional
    Number of periods to extrapolate the trend into the future

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that decomposes time series

optional_params.name: fperiods
optional_params.description: Number of periods to forecast (default: 12)

optional_params.name: fmethod
optional_params.description: Forecasting method ('holt_winters', 'linear', 'exponential') (default: 'holt_winters')

optional_params.name: seasonal_periods
optional_params.description: Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated) (optional)

optional_params.name: confidence_interval
optional_params.description: Confidence level for prediction intervals (default: 0.95)

forecast_metric.description:
Forecast future values of a metric

Parameters:
-----------
metric_column : str
    Column to forecast
fperiods : int, default=12
    Number of periods to forecast
fmethod : str, default='holt_winters'
    Forecasting method ('holt_winters', 'linear', 'exponential')
seasonal_periods : int, optional
    Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated)
confidence_interval : float, default=0.95
    Confidence level for prediction intervals

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that forecasts future values

optional_params.name: test_method
optional_params.description: Statistical test method ('mann_kendall', 't_test', 'spearman') (default: 'mann_kendall')

optional_params.name: alpha
optional_params.description: Significance level (default: 0.05)

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling trend analysis (if None, test the entire series) (optional)

outputs.description: Function that tests for statistical trends.

calculate_statistical_trend.description:
Calculate statistical significance of trends

Parameters:
-----------
metric_column : str
    Column to test for trend
test_method : str, default='mann_kendall'
    Statistical test method ('mann_kendall', 't_test', 'spearman')
alpha : float, default=0.05
    Significance level
window : int, optional
    Window size for rolling trend analysis (if None, test the entire series)

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that tests for statistical trends

optional_params.name: comparison_type
optional_params.description: Type of comparison ('year_over_year', 'month_over_month', 'week_over_week', 'period_over_period') (default: 'year_over_year')

optional_params.name: n_periods
optional_params.description: Number of periods to go back for comparison (default: 1)

optional_params.name: aggregation
optional_params.description: Method to aggregate values within periods ('mean', 'sum', 'median', 'min', 'max') (default: 'mean')

outputs.description: Function that compares metrics between periods.

compare_periods.description:
Compare metrics between different time periods (e.g., year-over-year, month-over-month)

Parameters:
-----------
metric_column : str
    Column to compare
comparison_type : str, default='year_over_year'
    Type of comparison ('year_over_year', 'month_over_month', 'week_over_week', 'period_over_period')
n_periods : int, default=1
    Number of periods to go back for comparison
aggregation : str, default='mean'
    Method to aggregate values within periods ('mean', 'sum', 'median', 'min', 'max')

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that compares metrics between periods

optional_params.name: n
optional_params.description: Number of top metrics to return (default: 5)

optional_params.name: metric_type
optional_params.description: Type of metric to rank by ('growth', 'trend', 'volatility', 'absolute_change') (default: 'growth')

optional_params.name: ascending
optional_params.description: Whether to sort in ascending order (False = highest values first) (default: False)

get_top_metrics.description:
Get top metrics based on growth, trend, or other criteria

Parameters:
-----------
n : int, default=5
    Number of top metrics to return
metric_type : str, default='growth'
    Type of metric to rank by ('growth', 'trend', 'volatility', 'absolute_change')
ascending : bool, default=False
    Whether to sort in ascending order (False = highest values first)

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that gets top metrics
